name: Blank
author: Ledger
description: Zero chrome — your HTML defines the entire layout.

metadata.label: Page layout
metadata.description: Switch to 'contained' to wrap this page in a centered column. Default is full-bleed so your HTML controls width.

metadata.label: Show site navigation
metadata.description: Add a simple top nav with the site name and published pages. Off by default — Blank is meant to be chrome-free.
